# Discord IP ranges from public rule-set candidates.
# Main source: nDPI generated Discord network list + public Discord voice/media lists.
# Keep domain routing in geosite:MORDA-PROXY and geosite:MORDA-DISCORD-EXTRA.
# Cloudflare media candidates are intentionally narrow public voice/media ranges, not whole Cloudflare.

3.233.158.26/32
3.233.158.111/32

35.208.0.0/24
35.213.98.0/24

# Public Discord rule sets also include broader Google Cloud aggregates.
# These cover rotating Discord voice/media UDP endpoints and avoid chasing /32s.
35.192.0.0/12
35.208.0.0/12
35.224.0.0/12
35.240.0.0/13

# Public Discord/ipcall Google Cloud voice/media candidates.
# 35.217.0.0/16 is intentionally broad: repeated Happ/Xray logs show
# Discord voice UDP landing on changing 35.217.x.x hosts, and adding them one
# by one is too fragile for end users. Keep explicit /24 and /32 entries below
# as audit trail for observed/public candidates.

35.217.0.0/24
